Package neqsim.process.mechanicaldesign.separator.primaryseparation

package neqsim.process.mechanicaldesign.separator.primaryseparation
Primary separation (inlet device) models for separator mechanical design.

This package provides classes for modeling and sizing inlet devices used in oil/gas separators. Inlet devices redistribute the inlet two-phase flow, reduce momentum, and perform initial bulk liquid separation. Types include inlet vane, inlet vane with mesh pad, and inlet cyclones.

Version:
1.0
Author:
NeqSim
